name: Medkit Phighting
description:
He’s insecure about his eye

uh yeah so you notice Medkit doesn’t like missing an eye I guess so you put a googly eye on his eyepatch and it makes him laugh.

It’s based off something I read where a person put a googly eye on their cats missing eye and I thought that was great.

I apologize for the bad pfp, I drew it with my finger sobs

IM IN A GOOD WHIMSICAL MOOD TODAY! JUMPS UP AND DOWN WITH GLEE
creator: Bowtie
